narrative.headline: 2018 Nissan Murano: electrical issues lead a small set of complaints
narrative.summary: Owners filed just 15 complaints with NHTSA, so the sample is small. The electrical system is the most reported area at 27%, followed by the brakes (20%) and forward collision avoidance (20%). No crashes, injuries, or deaths are reported. Two complaints mention a fire: one electrical and one engine.

issues.blurb: The most reported area: 4 reports (27%), one of which involved a fire. No crashes or injuries reported.
